prompt:
Anatomical muscle-activation diagram of the "站立提踵" (standing calf raise) exercise, side view, facing right, with the feet and ankles clearly visible at the bottom of the frame. Person posture: Athletic person at the TOP PEAK of a standing calf raise — both heels are MAXIMALLY LIFTED OFF THE GROUND. The person is balanced on the BALLS OF THE FEET (toes only) with the ankles in FULL PLANTARFLEXION — heels are visibly lifted very high, the ankle is at the most extended angle possible, like a ballet dancer en pointe. There should be a CLEAR VISIBLE GAP between both heels and the floor. Both legs are completely straight, hip-width apart. Torso upright with neutral spine, arms hanging at the sides. Plain black athletic shorts and gray tank top. CRITICAL: this is the TOP of the movement — heels MUST be lifted HIGH OFF THE GROUND with clear visible gap between heels and floor; ankles fully pointed downward. The figure is balanced on TIPTOES.. Body rendered with semi-transparent skin so underlying muscles are visible. Highlight in saturated red the primary working muscles: calf muscles (gastrocnemius and soleus). Highlight in orange the secondary stabilizers: tibialis posterior and small intrinsic foot muscles. Other muscles in pale neutral gray. Add small clean labels with thin black arrow leader lines pointing from each label to its target muscle group. The labels MUST be in simplified Chinese characters using a clean sans-serif font. Use exactly the following labels: "腓肠肌" pointing to the gastrocnemius (upper calf); "比目鱼肌" pointing to the soleus (deep calf); "足部稳定肌" pointing to the foot stabilizers. 

CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS — these are non-negotiable:
1. ALL TEXT IN THE IMAGE MUST BE SIMPLIFIED CHINESE CHARACTERS ONLY.
2. ABSOLUTELY NO ENGLISH WORDS, NO LATIN LETTERS, NO PINYIN ANYWHERE IN THE IMAGE.
3. NO romanization or transliteration of muscle names.
4. NO captions, NO subtitles, NO step-by-step text overlays.
5. ONLY the muscle labels listed above should appear as text.

Style: clean medical textbook illustration, off-white background, no facial features (head shape may be shown but no eyes/nose/mouth), anatomically accurate proportions, no shadows on background, no watermarks, no signature.
